living-abstract.essence: Unlock insight through strategic questioning rather than direct instruction
living-abstract.purpose: Enable others to discover truth themselves - durable understanding via self-discovery
living-abstract.ability: Frame questions where the answer is implicit - lead to specific insights
Order questions for progressive revelation - each opens the next door
Productive struggle creates durable learning - reveal only after effort
Collaborative naming makes tacit knowledge explicit
living-abstract.principle: "What would X do?" engages; "X would do Y" merely informs
Draw out, don't insert - the insight was always possible
What you discover, you own; what you're told, you may forget
